presets.name: Stock
presets.desc: Valori di base sicuri. CPU 3500 MHz, GPU 1500 MHz. Fresco e silenzioso.
presets.desc_it: Valori di base sicuri. CPU 3500 MHz, GPU 1500 MHz. Fresco e silenzioso.
presets.desc_en: Safe baseline. CPU 3500 MHz, GPU 1500 MHz. Cool and quiet.

presets.name: Performance
presets.desc: Equilibrato e undervoltato. CPU 3700 MHz ~1106 mV, GPU 2000 MHz. Efficiente per l'uso quotidiano.
presets.desc_it: Equilibrato e undervoltato. CPU 3700 MHz ~1106 mV, GPU 2000 MHz. Efficiente per l'uso quotidiano.
presets.desc_en: Balanced + undervolted. CPU 3700 MHz ~1106 mV, GPU 2000 MHz. Efficient for daily use.

presets.name: Turbo
presets.desc: Spinta alta. CPU 3900 MHz ~1199 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz. Ventola al 75%.
presets.desc_it: Spinta alta. CPU 3900 MHz ~1199 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz. Ventola al 75%.
presets.desc_en: High boost. CPU 3900 MHz ~1199 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz. Fan at 75%.

presets.name: Crazy
presets.desc: Massimo validato. CPU 4.0 GHz ~1224 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz, ventola 100%. ~83 C in stress sulla BC-250 di riferimento.
presets.desc_it: Massimo validato. CPU 4.0 GHz ~1224 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz, ventola 100%. ~83 C in stress sulla BC-250 di riferimento.
presets.desc_en: Validated maximum. CPU 4.0 GHz ~1224 mV (undervolt), GPU 2230 MHz, fan 100%. ~83 C under stress on the reference BC-250.
